messageUrl.title: Slack Message URL
messageUrl.description: The URL of the Slack message in thread that was sent; opens in Slack.
messageUrl.einstein:description: The Slack message URL for the sent message; opens in Slack.

messageTs.title: Slack Message Timestamp
messageTs.description: The timestamp for when the message in thread was sent in Slack.
messageTs.einstein:description: The timestamp for when the message was sent in Slack.
